description: User 2 (services@getsally.io): Adds Google Sheet data to EXISTING pipeline run from step 09. MCP must ask 'new pipeline or add to existing?' and user chooses existing. Tests dedup: 40 overlapping with CSV run.

steps.description: User provides Google Sheet URL. MCP MUST ask whether to create new pipeline or add to existing.
steps.user_prompt: I also have companies in this Google Sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgVE2upms/edit
user_prompt_variants: Here's another batch from Google Sheets: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgVE2upms/edit#gid=0
I have more leads in Google Sheets: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgVE2upms
steps.critical_requirement: MCP MUST NOT auto-launch a new pipeline. It MUST ask the user whether to add to existing or create new. This is because blacklisting is per-project: adding to the same project deduplicates automatically.

steps.description: User explicitly says to add to existing pipeline.
user_prompt_variants: Same pipeline, just add these companies
Use the existing run, add the sheet data there
Don't create a new one, add to the current pipeline
steps.critical_requirement: The gather call uses the SAME project_id as the CSV run. Dedup happens at the project level: 40 companies that were already discovered from CSV are detected as duplicates.

steps.description: Blacklist check — should show the 40 overlap as already existing
steps.user_prompt: Run blacklist check on the new companies
user_prompt_variants: Blacklist check for the sheet import

steps.description: Pre-filter, scrape, analyze the new 70 companies
steps.user_prompt: Scrape and analyze the new companies
user_prompt_variants: Run the pipeline on the new batch

db_checks: gathering_runs has 2 runs for Result project (CSV + Sheet)
discovered_companies has exactly 180 unique domains for Result project (110 from CSV + 70 new from Sheet)
40 companies from Sheet were detected as duplicates (already in project from CSV run)
blacklist is project-scoped: companies blacklisted in CSV run are also blacklisted for Sheet run
both runs share the same classification prompt (or MCP asked if user wants to change it)
